title: Better Side Shield Universal
description: Improves the shield side view for a cleaner and more comfortable look.
body:
Better Side Shield adjusts the shield model to improve its side view
while keeping the vanilla style intact.
![view](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/46d1d51999504bceb4f9386d428f37c542e66924_0.webp)
Features:
• Cleaner side positioning
• Vanilla-friendly model
• No gameplay changes
• Lightweight and optimized
• Compatible with modern Minecraft versions

This pack only modifies the shield model and texture.
